app.name: Local Artists' Drawings
register.title: Create an account
register.marketingConsent: I agree to receive commercial offers and news from the vendor (optional).
register.activationNote: After registration, you will receive an email with an activation link valid for 24 hours.
register.success: Account created! Check your inbox to activate your account.
register.error.emailUsed: This email address is already in use.
register.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
activate.title: Set your password
activate.subtitle: This link was sent to you by email when your account was created.
activate.passwordHint: Minimum 12 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a special character (@$!%*?&_-#).
activate.error.alreadyActive: Your account may already be active.
activate.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
activate.resend.label: Your email address
activate.resend.success: If a pending account matches this email, a new activation link has been sent.
activate.resend.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.title: Sign in
login.error.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.error.unauthorized: This account does not have access to the buyer portal.
login.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.mfa.title: Two-step verification
login.mfa.subtitle: Enter the code generated by your authenticator app.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account matches this address, an email has just been sent. Check your inbox.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Password reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.error.tokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.error.compromised: This password was found in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
resetPassword.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
profile.title: My profile
profile.marketingConsent: I agree to receive commercial offers and news from the vendor.
profile.marketingConsent.hint: You can change this at any time. This does not affect your order confirmation emails.
profile.addresses.title: My delivery addresses
profile.addresses.col.label: Label
profile.addresses.form.label: Label (e.g. Home)
profile.addresses.error.lastActive: You cannot delete your only active address.
profile.addresses.error.invalidCountry: This country is not available for delivery (Eurozone only).
profile.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
catalog.filters.title: Filters
catalog.error.load: Unable to load the catalogue. Please try again.
cart.title: My cart
cart.loginRequired: Sign in to access your cart.
cart.error.load: Unable to load your cart. Please try again.
cart.error.outOfStock: This product is out of stock or the requested quantity exceeds available stock.
cart.error.add: Unable to add this product to the cart.
cart.error.update: An error occurred while updating the cart.
checkout.title: Place order
checkout.address.title: Delivery address
checkout.address.noAddresses: You have no saved delivery addresses.
checkout.carrier.title: Shipping method
checkout.carrier.none: No carrier available for this country.
checkout.payment.title: Payment
checkout.payment.wireNote: You will receive bank details by email after order validation.
checkout.summary.title: Summary
checkout.confirmation.title: Order confirmed
checkout.confirmation.cardSuccess: Your card payment has been accepted. Your order is now awaiting processing.
checkout.confirmation.wireNote: Your order will be processed upon receipt of the wire transfer.
checkout.confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to you.
checkout.error.invalidCountry: This country is not available for delivery.
checkout.error.carrierNotAvailable: This carrier is not available for the selected country.
checkout.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
orders.list.title: My orders
orders.detail.title: Order {{number}}
orders.tracking.title: Shipment tracking
orders.tracking.notAvailable: In transit — tracking number not yet available.
orders.error.loginRequired: You must be logged in to view your orders.
orders.cancel.title: Cancel order
orders.cancel.description: You may cancel this order. For wire transfer orders, provide your IBAN for the refund.
orders.cancel.ibanRequired: An IBAN is required to cancel a wire transfer order.
orders.cancel.invalidState: This order can no longer be cancelled.
orders.cancel.error: An error occurred while cancelling the order.
orders.psc.title: Request cancellation
orders.psc.description: You may request cancellation of this order. The vendor will need to approve your request.
orders.psc.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for your cancellation request…
orders.psc.ibanRequired: An IBAN is required for wire transfer orders.
orders.psc.invalidState: This order cannot be cancelled at its current stage.
orders.psc.error: An error occurred while submitting the cancellation request.
orders.psc.confirmPrompt: Send cancellation request to the vendor?
orders.psc.pendingVendorDecision: Your cancellation request is awaiting the vendor's decision.
orders.support.message: A problem with your order? Contact our support by email.
maintenance.title: Platform under maintenance
maintenance.message: Our platform is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again in a few moments.
stock.notify.success: You will be notified by email as soon as this product is back in stock.
stock.notify.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
stock.notify.alreadySubscribed: You are already subscribed to this alert.
carousel.label: Scrolling announcements
